retrieved_result: Military Deaths Under Clinton and Bush "Q: Did more soldiers die during Bill Clinton’s term than have died fighting in Iraq and Afghanistan? A: Actually, even counting non-combat fatalities, more military personnel died during the first six years of George Bush’s tenure than during the entire eight years that Bill Clinton was in office."
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses military fatalities and U.S. presidents, not software development IDEs. Therefore it is not relevant to the query.

history.title: Military Deaths Under Clinton and Bush
history.description: "Q: Did more soldiers die during Bill Clinton’s term than have died fighting in Iraq and Afghanistan? A: Actually, even counting non-combat fatalities, more military personnel died during the first six years of George Bush’s tenure than during the entire eight years that Bill Clinton was in office.
